top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Risks Feedback Loop as Index Funds Eye 30% of Float
top_signals.summary: The prospect of billions of dollars of oncoming demand for SpaceX stock from index-tracking funds risks creating a feedback loop that drives the shares of Elon Musk’s company even higher, academics and market observers have warned.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin may act as a ‘canary in the coal mine’ as risk-off pressure spreads: Bitwise
top_signals.summary: Bitwise research suggests that Bitcoin is leading a broader risk-off move across markets as global liquidity and stablecoin reserves remain elevated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
top_signals.summary: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: White House border czar Tom Homan blames New York Gov. Hochul for promised ICE surge
top_signals.summary: Gov. Kathy Hohul in May signed a New York law that barred agreements with ICE that made it easier for the agency to detain immigrants who had been jailed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Norwegian Parliament Votes to Review Floating Wind Subsidies
top_signals.summary: Norway's parliament on Tuesday ordered the government to review its planned subsidy for the country's first commercial floating offshore wind farm, raising concerns of a full development stop and a wider impact on energy transition projects.A proposal by the opposition Conservative Party seeking fin
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BBB refers prediction market Kalshi to state regulators over ad inquiry
top_signals.summary: A BBB advertising watchdog escalated its review of Kalshi after the prediction market platform declined to participate in an inquiry into influencer disclosure practices.
